segments.text: All 14 Indian Prime Ministers so far have spoken Hindi and English.
Nehru, Shastri, and Vajpayee spoke Hindi, English, and Urdu. Modi speaks Hindi, English, and Gujarati.
Manmohan Singh speaks four languages: Hindi, English, Punjabi, and Urdu.
Indira Gandhi spoke six: English, French, German, Punjabi, Bengali, and Hindi.
P.V. Narasimha Rao spoke the most: 17 languages in total (11 Indian, 6 foreign).
